title: [InstCombine][X86] Only demand the active index bits for VPERMV/VPERMV3 mask values

tests.source_program:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare <4 x i32> @llvm.x86.avx512.permvar.si.128(<4 x i32>, <4 x i32>) #0

define <4 x i32> @test_permvar_si_128_and_mask(<4 x i32> %a0, <4 x i32> %a1) {
  %m = and <4 x i32> %a1, <i32 -1, i32 -1, i32 -1, i32 -1>
  %s = call <4 x i32> @llvm.x86.avx512.permvar.si.128(<4 x i32> %a0, <4 x i32> %m)
  ret <4 x i32> %s
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare <4 x i32> @llvm.x86.avx512.permvar.si.128(<4 x i32>, <4 x i32>) #0

define <4 x i32> @test_permvar_si_128_and_mask(<4 x i32> %a0, <4 x i32> %a1) {
  %m = and <4 x i32> %a1, <i32 -1, i32 -1, i32 -1, i32 -1>
  %s = call <4 x i32> @llvm.x86.avx512.permvar.si.128(<4 x i32> %a0, <4 x i32> %m)
  ret <4 x i32> %s
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: 128-bit i32 permutation with AND operation - existing tests cover i16/i8/i64 but not i32 at 128-bit width, and AND pattern differs from OR patterns in known tests

tests.source_program:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare <8 x float> @llvm.x86.avx512.permvar.ps.256(<8 x float>, <8 x i32>) #0

define <8 x float> @demandedbit_test_permvar_ps_256_mask_and(<8 x float> %a0, <8 x i32> %a1) {
  %masked = and <8 x i32> %a1, <i32 -1, i32 -1, i32 -1, i32 -1, i32 -1, i32 -1, i32 -1, i32 -1>
  %m = or <8 x i32> %masked, <i32 256, i32 512, i32 1024, i32 2048, i32 4096, i32 8192, i32 16384, i32 32768>
  %s = call <8 x float> @llvm.x86.avx512.permvar.ps.256(<8 x float> %a0, <8 x i32> %m)
  ret <8 x float> %s
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare <8 x float> @llvm.x86.avx512.permvar.ps.256(<8 x float>, <8 x i32>) #0

define <8 x float> @demandedbit_test_permvar_ps_256_mask_and(<8 x float> %a0, <8 x i32> %a1) {
  %masked = and <8 x i32> %a1, <i32 -1, i32 -1, i32 -1, i32 -1, i32 -1, i32 -1, i32 -1, i32 -1>
  %m = or <8 x i32> %masked, <i32 256, i32 512, i32 1024, i32 2048, i32 4096, i32 8192, i32 16384, i32 32768>
  %s = call <8 x float> @llvm.x86.avx512.permvar.ps.256(<8 x float> %a0, <8 x i32> %m)
  ret <8 x float> %s
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Tests 256-bit float permutation with AND-OR chain on mask. Existing tests only use simple OR with constants. This tests the optimization's ability to handle multiple bitwise operations before the permute while still demanding only the necessary index bits (3 bits for 8 elements).

tests.source_program:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare <8 x i16> @llvm.x86.avx512.vpermt2var.hi.128(<8 x i16>, <8 x i16>, <8 x i16>) #0

define <8 x i16> @demandedbit_test_vpermt2var_hi_128_mask(<8 x i16> %a0, <8 x i16> %a1, <8 x i16> %a2) {
  %m = add <8 x i16> %a2, <i16 0, i16 0, i16 0, i16 0, i16 0, i16 0, i16 0, i16 0>
  %s = call <8 x i16> @llvm.x86.avx512.vpermt2var.hi.128(<8 x i16> %a0, <8 x i16> %a1, <8 x i16> %m)
  ret <8 x i16> %s
}
tests.expect_optimized_program:
; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind willreturn memory(none)
declare <8 x i16> @llvm.x86.avx512.vpermt2var.hi.128(<8 x i16>, <8 x i16>, <8 x i16>) #0

define <8 x i16> @demandedbit_test_vpermt2var_hi_128_mask(<8 x i16> %a0, <8 x i16> %a1, <8 x i16> %a2) {
  %m = and <8 x i16> %a2, <i16 15, i16 15, i16 15, i16 15, i16 15, i16 15, i16 15, i16 15>
  %s = call <8 x i16> @llvm.x86.avx512.vpermt2var.hi.128(<8 x i16> %a0, <8 x i16> %a1, <8 x i16> %m)
  ret <8 x i16> %s
}
tests.outside_scope_reason: Tests VPERMT2VAR (table-based dual-source) intrinsic - different from VPERMI2VAR and VPERMVAR, uses the dual-source path but with different semantics, not covered in existing test suite
